title: Junior Instructional Designer at Amity University Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Amity University Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Amity University Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amity University Advisory Limited:
Amity University Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University Advisory Limited!
